reviews.review_description: No English option offered!  How do I get a refund?
But I do love me some jpegs in VR.

Even though I don't speak the language I could appreciate the art and historical artifacts. The app is very well done, quick and easy to navigate. And it looks good. 

I'd give it five stars if they did the following mods: 1) Cut the intro by half or less (it's too long); 2) Make the images a little bit larger for the selected objects. 

Also a desired feature would be the ability to view some objects in real 3D, like sculptures for instance. This is VR, right?
